benefits.description: Retatrutide significantly reduces appetite and caloric intake
Tesamorelin forces body toward anabolism and helps maintain and build muscle
MOTS-C helps with glucose uptake into muscle and fat partitioning, directing calories toward use rather than storage
Retatrutide described as fantastic for weight loss via controlled appetite suppression

protocol_notes: User has personal experience with retatrutide and notes it makes caloric intake very difficult. Emphasizes that tesamorelin is best used with clean diet and hard training. MOTS-C requires proper diet and training to be effective and will not overcome dirty bulk.
